proposal_text:
Title: Echoes of the Glen
Concept: Become the Seeker. Unravel forgotten whispers.
Website Product Description: Step into 'Echoes of the Glen,' an atmospheric mystery game where you play as a 'Seeker' drawn to a secluded, mystical village. Here, secrets aren't just hidden; they linger as emotional traces and forgotten whispers of the past. Use your unique abilities to decipher these echoes, piecing together fragmented memories and uncovering the truth of what transpired in the glen. But this isn't just about the village's forgotten history—it's also about your own. As you investigate, you'll discover a deep personal connection to the village's past, unlocking clues to your own lost identity. Prepare for a compelling blend of crime-solving and mystical exploration, offering a deeply emotional journey unlike any other.

Title: The Daily Portal
Concept: Your commute is a portal
Website Product Description: Imagine your daily journey to work or school isn't just a trip, but a thrilling gateway to a hidden world. "The Daily Portal" takes your ordinary commute and transforms it into an extraordinary adventure, blurring the lines between routine and wonder. Within the familiar streets and landmarks of your city, you'll discover a vibrant urban ecosystem, brimming with deep lore, surprising characters, and fantastical elements hidden in plain sight. What seems like a mundane trip becomes a captivating treasure hunt, where every turn, every stop, and every path chosen can reveal new mysteries and untold stories. Engage in unique character interactions that shift based on your choices, making each journey profoundly personal and rewarding. This game seamlessly blends the comfort of your daily life with the excitement of exploration, inviting you to look beyond the surface and uncover the magic that's been waiting for you all along. Get ready to transform your routine into an epic adventure.
